title: Summarize verification evidence for a public-safe fixture
request: Summarize what changed, which checks ran, what was skipped, and what risk remains.

skippedChecks: manual slash-command quality evaluation: not run in headless demo
residualRisk: demo proves deterministic fixture signals, not model output quality
outputSignals: keeps passed, skipped, and residual risk separate
states that fixture validation is not an LLM execution
does not promote moving main as stable release evidence
failureSignals: describes the demo as a live Claude Code run
publishes private paths or project names

boundaries: does not call Claude Code, Codex, network tools, or marketplace install paths
does not include private consumer names, endpoints, credentials, local paths, or repository addresses
